summary: Completed testing of NEW TripSync features: Trip Progress Bar (6 steps), Trip Readiness Score (17%), Smart Summary, navigation links, and linked data across features. Backend 100% pass rate. Frontend core features verified successfully.

frontend_issues.auth_note: Budget and Slot Prices pages exist and routes are correct, but Playwright auth doesn't persist across page.goto() calls. Pages redirect to login as expected when not authenticated. Backend APIs confirmed working.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/trips/{id} returns readiness field with score (17%), checks, phase, next_action, winning_destination
Backend: All 20 API tests passed (Budget Tracker, Slot Prices, Flight Coordination, Availability Heatmap, Lock/Unlock dates, Guest functionality)
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero image and CTA buttons
Frontend: Login flow works with alice_range@test.com
Frontend: TripWorkspace shows Trip Progress bar with 6 steps (Setup ✓, Prefs ✓, Dates, Vote, Budget, Book)
Frontend: TripWorkspace shows readiness badge '17% ready'
Frontend: TripWorkspace shows smart summary row with participants count (1/4) and budget items (0 added)
Frontend: Availability Heatmap page loads correctly
Frontend: Heatmap shows calendar view, participant grid, and most probable travel dates sidebar
Frontend: Action buttons (Compare Prices, Coordinate Flights, Budget) correctly hidden when dates not locked (conditional rendering working as designed)

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 core features verified, 1 auth persistence issue in test environment)

readiness_score_feature.backend: Returns all required fields: score (17%), checks (has_participants, all_prefs_submitted, has_dates_locked, has_votes, has_budget_items, has_destination), phase (preferences), next_action, prefs_count, votes_count, budget_items_count, winning_destination
readiness_score_feature.frontend: Displays readiness badge '17% ready' prominently at top of trip workspace

trip_progress_bar.steps: All 6 steps present: Setup (✓), Prefs (✓), Dates (3), Vote (4), Budget (5), Book (6)
trip_progress_bar.visual: Green checkmarks for completed steps, numbered circles for pending steps, progress line connecting all steps

smart_summary.displays: Participants count (1/4), Budget items count (0 added), Locked dates (when available), Top destination (when voted)
smart_summary.location: Inside Trip Progress section, below the 6-step progress bar

verified_links: All navigation links have proper data-testid attributes

availability_heatmap_actions.note: Action buttons (Compare Prices per Slot, Coordinate Group Flights, Budget) only appear when dates are locked. This is correct behavior per code review.

budget_and_slot_prices_pages.backend_apis: GET /api/trips/{id}/budget and GET /api/trips/{id}/slot-prices both return 200 OK
budget_and_slot_prices_pages.note: Pages require authentication. Playwright test redirects to login due to auth not persisting across page.goto() calls, but this is expected behavior.
